TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Zayazayan == u sulit nu Hulam: : u siwkay nu niyazu' i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Zayazayan. u kasalumaluma' nu Zayazayan sa, 233 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 793 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 768 ku tademaw, pakalatu 97%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 25 ku tademaw, pakalatu 3%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Paywan(Paiwan) 89%, Rukay(Rukai) 3%, Tayan(Tayal) 1%, Pangcah(Amis) 1%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, zumazuma 2%. u niyazu' nu Paywan u Paywan a niyazu' kuyni. tuud ku Paywan a tademaw itiniay a niyazu'. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayay ku Sakizaya itini. u zuma a tademaw sa u Rukay(Rukai) u Tayan(Tayal) u Pangcah(Amis) atu Yuwatan. u cidekay nu Taywan a Incumin: u Sakizaya a binacadan azihan i u Pangcah(Amis) a binacadan azihan i u Tayal a binacadan azihan i u Paywan a binacadan azihan i u Bunun a binacadan azihan i u Piyuma a binacadan azihan i u Rukay a binacadan azihan i u Takuku a binacadan azihan i u Sejek a binacadan azihan i u Saysia a binacadan azihan i u Kabalan a binacadan azihan i u Kanakanabu a binacadan azihan i u Laaluwa a binacadan azihan i u Saw a binacadan azihan i u Chou a binacadan azihan i u Tau a binacadan azihan i
S.PHON: == zajazajan == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: : u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i piŇčtuŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu zajazajan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu zajazajan sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, pajwan(paiwan) **%, *ukaj(*ukai) *%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) *%, juwatan(bunun) *%, zumazuma *%. u nijazu Ē~ ° nu pajwan u pajwan a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni. tuud ku pajwan a tad…ômaw itiniaj a nijazu Ē~ °. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inajaj ku sakizaja itini. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u *ukaj(*ukai) u tajan(tajar~…ĺ) u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) atu juwatan. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan a in ¶umin: u sakizaja a bina ¶adan azińßan i u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) a bina ¶adan azińßan i u tajar~…ĺ a bina ¶adan azińßan i u pajwan a bina ¶adan azińßan i u bunun a bina ¶adan azińßan i u pijuma a bina ¶adan azińßan i u *ukaj a bina ¶adan azińßan i u takuku a bina ¶adan azińßan i u s…ôj…ôk a bina ¶adan azińßan i u sajsia a bina ¶adan azińßan i u kabar~…ĺan a bina ¶adan azińßan i u kanakanabu a bina ¶adan azińßan i u r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa a bina ¶adan azińßan i u saw a bina ¶adan azińßan i u ¶ńßou a bina ¶adan azińßan i u tau a bina ¶adan azińßan i
S.FORM: == Zayazayan == u sulit nu Hulam: : u siwkay nu niyazu' i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Zayazayan. u kasalumaluma' nu Zayazayan sa, 233 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 793 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 768 ku tademaw, pakalatu 97%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 25 ku tademaw, pakalatu 3%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Paywan(Paiwan) 89%, Rukay(Rukai) 3%, Tayan(Tayal) 1%, Pangcah(Amis) 1%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, zumazuma 2%. u niyazu' nu Paywan u Paywan a niyazu' kuyni. tuud ku Paywan a tademaw itiniay a niyazu'. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayay ku Sakizaya itini. u zuma a tademaw sa u Rukay(Rukai) u Tayan(Tayal) u Pangcah(Amis) atu Yuwatan. u cidekay nu Taywan a Incumin: u Sakizaya a binacadan azihan i u Pangcah(Amis) a binacadan azihan i u Tayal a binacadan azihan i u Paywan a binacadan azihan i u Bunun a binacadan azihan i u Piyuma a binacadan azihan i u Rukay a binacadan azihan i u Takuku a binacadan azihan i u Sejek a binacadan azihan i u Saysia a binacadan azihan i u Kabalan a binacadan azihan i u Kanakanabu a binacadan azihan i u Laaluwa a binacadan azihan i u Saw a binacadan azihan i u Chou a binacadan azihan i u Tau a binacadan azihan i
S.PHON: == zajazajan == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: : u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i piŇčtuŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu zajazajan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu zajazajan sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, pajwan(paiwan) **%, *ukaj(*ukai) *%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) *%, juwatan(bunun) *%, zumazuma *%. u nijazu Ē~ ° nu pajwan u pajwan a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni. tuud ku pajwan a tad…ômaw itiniaj a nijazu Ē~ °. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inajaj ku sakizaja itini. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u *ukaj(*ukai) u tajan(tajar~…ĺ) u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) atu juwatan. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan a in ¶umin: u sakizaja a bina ¶adan azińßan i u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) a bina ¶adan azińßan i u tajar~…ĺ a bina ¶adan azińßan i u pajwan a bina ¶adan azińßan i u bunun a bina ¶adan azińßan i u pijuma a bina ¶adan azińßan i u *ukaj a bina ¶adan azińßan i u takuku a bina ¶adan azińßan i u s…ôj…ôk a bina ¶adan azińßan i u sajsia a bina ¶adan azińßan i u kabar~…ĺan a bina ¶adan azińßan i u kanakanabu a bina ¶adan azińßan i u r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa a bina ¶adan azińßan i u saw a bina ¶adan azińßan i u ¶ńßou a bina ¶adan azińßan i u tau a bina ¶adan azińßan i
